brief: US immigration enforcement and military strikes on Iran dominate today's news, while AI research papers explore coding assistants and visualization tools.
news_summary: Federal agents' shootings and US strikes on Iran frame a tense day, with political fallout in Maine and ethical debates on organ donation.
papers_summary: New papers explore AI coding assistants, visualization frameworks, and brain-computer interfaces for speech decoding.

todays_image.caption: The Grumman F-14A Tomcat’s iconic role as an interceptor chasing down fleeing targets mirrors the aggressive pursuit implied by immigration officers shooting at vehicles.
todays_image.title: Model, Static, Grumman F-14A Tomcat
